title: Allocations tables for all consolidated grants  from 2026-2027 to 2028-2029
body: "This table sets out multi-year allocations for the years 2026 to 2027 to 2028 to 2029 for the 4 new consolidated grants:   Homelessness, Rough Sleeping and Domestic Abuse Grant Public Health Grant Crisis and Resilience Fund Children, Families and Youth Grant   This table also sets out notional allocations for the 10 Greater Manchester local authorities which forgo core Public Health Grant funding as part of their enhanced business rates retention arrangements, as well as multi-year allocations of the Mayoral Capacity Fund. "
